sections_cited: Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Income Tax Reference Application No.34 of 2020 Date Order with Signature of Judge Hearing of case (priority) 1. For order on office objection Nos.24 & 25 2. For hearing of main case 12.02.2026 Mr. Munawar Ali Memon, Advocate for the applicant Mr. Khalid Javed Khan, Advocate for the respondent On 26.01.2026 the following order was passed: Mr. Khalid Jawed advocate files vakalatnama on behalf of respondent, which is taken on record. Per learned counsel for respondent this matter is squarely covered against the respondent by virtue of judgment of honourable Supreme Court in the case of Commissioner Inland Revenue Lahore vs. Millat Tractors Limited, Lahore and others reported as 2024 PTD 483. Learned counsel for the applicant may seek instructions. At his request to come up after two weeks.” Today learned counsel for the applicant confirms the observation recorded supra and states that this reference application may be dismissed as withdrawn. Order accordingly. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Sindh Revenue Board, as required per Section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. JUDGE JUDGE Asif
